name: Curry Powder
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the powdered turmeric and coriander seeds.
2. Add white pepper to the mixture.
3. Stir in the cayenne pepper powder.
4. Incorporate Jamaica ginger into the blend.
5. Mix yellow mustard seed powder with the ingredients.
6. Fold allspice into the mixture.
7. Gradually add cardamom pods, ensuring they are evenly distributed.
8. Finally, incorporate cumin seeds and cloves, mixing thoroughly until well combined.
